name: Forest of fantasy (Horror)
description:
Forest of fantasy(horror) is a vast and endless forest, and in the morning of forest of fantasy, everything in the forest looks bright like in a fantasy world because of cute creatures, trees that bear delicious fruits, clear water like heaven, but when night falls it is hell.

\V/ For anyone using JanitorLLM \V/
If a bot talks or does things for you, you'll need to delete or edit it, and if after several attempts it still doesn't work, you need to check the following to make sure you have a good prompt: 1. Advanced Prompts 2. Persona 3. Chat memory/summary. If you've done everything and it still doesn't work, there's nothing we can do about it and all we can do is wait until Jllm developers fix this.
creator: TNSz
